name: own-auth-workspace
description: Vendor-neutral authentication platform for framework-independent auth, sessions, API keys, and organisations.
author: Tina Li

scripts.release:check: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm --filter own-auth test:integration:required && pnpm --filter own-auth pack:check
scripts.release:publish: pnpm run release:check-clean && pnpm run release:check && pnpm --filter own-auth publish:npm && pnpm run release:tag
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter own-auth typecheck && pnpm --filter own-auth-basic-node-example build
